Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Lynn Redgrave joins Carol in "A Dirty English Movie." In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Vicki try to hide a dog.
Video.title: Lynn Redgrave

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi joins Carol, Burt Reynolds shows up for Q&A, and John Davidson salutes classic movies from MGM.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Image.alt: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Paul Sand guests! Sketches dealing with weddings are featured. Also: bits related to the energy crisis.
Video.title: Paul Sand

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway plays a prison warden responding to a riot, and a suitor whose test reaction causes havoc.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball is in hot water with his wife. Then, a nervous woman finds her spouse pushing her buttons.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Paul Sand and Eydie Gorme guest star in a salute to movie series such as "Dr. Kildaire".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence takes the stage to sing a duet with Dick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Wayne Rogers, Buddy Ebsen

Video.summary: Barbara McNair and Carol spoof a classic TV series with "I Try".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Casesar

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Lyle for a tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca take part in a fairy tale musical extravaganza.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Nanette Fabray and Trini Lopez!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Trini Lopez, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Guest star Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family" in this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joanne Woodward

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for the movie spoof "Sinful Woman", a presentation of the Lyle-hosted Tearjerker Theatre.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters crashes Q&A. Sid Caesar teaches Carol self-defense, then joins the gang for a spoof.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol's old friends Garry Moore and Durward Kirby visit for the holidays.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Mel Torme returns! Mel discovers the greatest superstar behind the counter of a drugstore.
Video.title: Mel Torme

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters joins for a sketch about bratty kids. The Early Early Show presents "The Most Happy Stella."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as the teacher of Eunice and Bubba in "The Family." Also: a remodeled kitchen falls apart.
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence appear in commercial spoofs. Tim plays The Oldest Man and is in a pantomime.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde

Video.summary: The season finale features the regular cast, highlighting Carol's performance as the girlfriend of a producer.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Pat Carroll guest. Tim plays Lone Ranger & a man who lives a dog's life. Pat joins "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Mickey Rooney and John Davidson guest. Davidson sings, Rooney stars in a Western, and Carol must choose.
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Features Dick as an airport traveller getting a farewell, and Tim as a steelworker seeking to do in his wife.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy." Dick Cavett crashes Q&A .
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Eydie Gorme & Tim Conway guest, with Tim in a spy spoof "Dr. Nose." Eydie leads a number about a baby.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests! Featuring an improv comedy performance.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns. Also, "Carol & Sis" plan a surprise party; and Carol is "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Madeline Kahn stars in the latest sketch with "The Family" as the pretentious director and star of a play.
Video.title: Madeline Kahn
